g.text: Source data: panel-A-efficacy.csv columns cancer_type/compound/mouse/tumor_volume_reduction_pct; panel-B-doseresponse.csv compound/dose_uM/rep/viability_pct; panel-C-admet.csv compound/metric/rep/value; panel-D-engagement.csv treatment/time_h/rep/engagement_pct; panel-E-safety.csv organ/group/mouse/toxicity_score. Bars show mean +/- SD except D, which shows mean +/- SEM; * p<0.05, ** p<0.01.
